readable_routes.notes: Readable Next.js AVB storefront root with __NEXT_DATA__, product/catalog Redux slices, catalog links, and PerimeterX script reference.

chunk_evidence.frontend_contract: Downloaded public Next.js chunks expose AVB catalog/product slices, base API prefix /api/rest, search route /search/<query>?limit=4&embed=products, category routes /catalog/<key>, product routes /products/<url_key>, and product IDs/entity_id fields.
chunk_evidence.outcome: The frontend contract is useful for GHST-293/browser-like transport, but not enough for immediate source promotion because product-bearing /api/rest calls return HTTP 403 under the current plain CLI transport.

promotion_decision: Do not promote ADU as an active source until dishwasher/category or exact appliance product rows replay with price-bearing payloads.
